content:
I'm currently using Evadus+  which works great for me for the most part but I would like to have the ability to switch between different GPT's when using the overlay feature during live tests. 

The reason for bringing this up is that I was using Google Gemini 2.5 pro which was able to answer all of the easy based hackerrank questions until it got to the advanced ones and that Gemini version sometimes was unable to generate code that passed all test cases for those harder questions. 

I tried the test again using Gemini 3 pro which passed all test cases this time but I had to  reopen the evadus+ app and switch over to that version before retaking the test.

I usually use Gemini 2.5 pro as I find that it generate results much faster than Gemini 3.0 but sometimes I would like to be able to switch over to Gemini 3.0 and use it for those harder questions

If there was a dropdown button (where I have the red arrow in my screenshot) that would allow me to switch between these versions (or the other GPT's that come with Evadus+) on the overlay while doing my online test instead of having to reopen the evadus+ app then switching to the version I want then that would be great
